title: SonicWall Per-Zone Interface Bandwidth Utilization (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall` traffic statistics or NetFlow exported from SonicWall where available
spl:
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)interface|X1|X2|zone")
| rex field=_raw "(?i)(?<iface>X\d+|ae\d+).*?(?<kbps>\d+)\s*kbps"
| timechart span=15m max(kbps) by iface
description: Understanding bytes per zone prevents saturated uplinks from masquerading as application bugs.
value: Guides upgrades and QoS changes with data instead of anecdotes.
implementation: If only syslog throughput is available, supplement with SNMP polling scripted input for `rx_bps`/`tx_bps`.
visualization: Timechart (bps by zone), area chart (95th percentile).

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Understanding bytes per zone prevents saturated uplinks from masquerading as application bugs — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
